title: Drinks policy
description: Is it BYOB, a dry event, or is there a bar? This is one of the first things people look for before RSVPing.

title: Dress code
description: Even a loose suggestion — casual, all-black, one colour — sets the tone and makes guests feel prepared.

title: Theme
description: Is there a visual or creative direction to the event? Helps guests know what to expect and makes the event more shareable.

title: Activities planned
description: Give a rough sense of what will happen — live music, a workshop, free time, a game. Even one line helps people decide.

title: Where to park, what to bring, who to ask for...
description: Anything guests should remember — a mat, a costume piece, no kids allowed, who to meet at the door... Reduces confusion on the day.
